name: run402-mcp
description: MCP server for Run402 — AI-native Postgres databases with REST API, auth, storage, and row-level security. Pay with x402 USDC micropayments.

scripts.build:sdk: mkdir -p sdk/core-dist && cp core/dist/*.js sdk/core-dist/ && cp core/dist/*.d.ts sdk/core-dist/ && tsc -p sdk/tsconfig.json
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:functions && tsc && mkdir -p cli/core-dist cli/sdk/dist cli/sdk/core-dist && cp core/dist/*.js cli/core-dist/ && cp -R sdk/dist/. cli/sdk/dist/ && cp sdk/core-dist/*.js cli/sdk/core-dist/
scripts.test: node --experimental-test-module-mocks --test --import tsx SKILL.test.ts sync.test.ts 'core/src/**/*.test.ts' 'sdk/src/**/*.test.ts' 'src/**/*.test.ts' && node --test cli-e2e.test.mjs cli-help.test.mjs cli-provision-active.test.mjs cli-argv.test.mjs cli-env.test.mjs && npm run test:docs
scripts.test:e2e: node --test cli-e2e.test.mjs cli-help.test.mjs cli-provision-active.test.mjs cli-argv.test.mjs cli-env.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration:fullstack: npm run build && node --test --import tsx fullstack-integration.test.ts

author: Kychee Technologies
